title: FLOSS Weekly 473: Gitlab
summary:
GitLab streamlines collaborative workflows. Visualize, prioritize, coordinate, and track progress with GitLab’s flexible project management tools.
Sid's career path is anything but traditional -- originally working as a director of operations for a personal submarine company he was first introduced to GitLab while working as a self-taught Ruby programmer. Sid commercialized GitLab in 2012 after discovering he was passionate about open source projects.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
